subject: [PATCH v6 02/22] swap: rearrange the swap header file

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch rearranges the swap header file (include/linux/swap.h) to group related functions into categories such as lifecycle swap, swap cache, and physical swap allocator and device APIs. The extern keyword is removed from these functions. This change is a clean-up effort with no functional changes intended.
